content.content:
1→#!/usr/bin/env bash
     2→
     3→cliproxy_load_env() {
     4→  local env_file="${HOME}/dotfiles/.env"
     5→  if [ -f "$env_file" ]; then
     6→    set -a
     7→    . "$env_file"
     8→    set +a
     9→  fi
    10→}
    11→
    12→cliproxy_strip_quotes() {
    13→  local value="$1"
    14→  value="${value%\"}"
    15→  value="${value#\"}"
    16→  printf '%s' "$value"
    17→}
    18→
    19→cliproxy_init_objectstore_env() {
    20→  cliproxy_load_env
    21→  OBJECTSTORE_ENDPOINT="$(cliproxy_strip_quotes "${OBJECTSTORE_ENDPOINT:-}")"
    22→  OBJECTSTORE_BUCKET="$(cliproxy_strip_quotes "${OBJECTSTORE_BUCKET:-cliproxyapi}")"
    23→  OBJECTSTORE_ACCESS_KEY="$(cliproxy_strip_quotes "${OBJECTSTORE_ACCESS_KEY:-}")"
    24→  OBJECTSTORE_SECRET_KEY="$(cliproxy_strip_quotes "${OBJECTSTORE_SECRET_KEY:-}")"
    25→  export OBJECTSTORE_ENDPOINT OBJECTSTORE_BUCKET OBJECTSTORE_ACCESS_KEY OBJECTSTORE_SECRET_KEY
    26→}
    27→
    28→cliproxy_has_objectstore_credentials() {
    29→  [ -n "${OBJECTSTORE_ENDPOINT:-}" ] &&
    30→    [ -n "${OBJECTSTORE_ACCESS_KEY:-}" ] &&
    31→    [ -n "${OBJECTSTORE_SECRET_KEY:-}" ]
    32→}
    33→
    34→cliproxy_auth_s3_uri() {
    35→  printf 's3://%s/auths/' "${OBJECTSTORE_BUCKET:?OBJECTSTORE_BUCKET is required}"
    36→}
    37→
    38→cliproxy_s3_sync() {
    39→  local source_path="$1"
    40→  local destination_path="$2"
    41→  AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID="${OBJECTSTORE_ACCESS_KEY:?OBJECTSTORE_ACCESS_KEY is required}" \
    42→    AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY="${OBJECTSTORE_SECRET_KEY:?OBJECTSTORE_SECRET_KEY is required}" \
    43→    @aws@ s3 sync \
    44→    --endpoint-url="${OBJECTSTORE_ENDPOINT:?OBJECTSTORE_ENDPOINT is required}" \
    45→    --no-progress \
    46→    "$source_path" \
    47→    "$destination_path" || true
    48→}
    49→
    50→cliproxy_sync_auth_from_s3() {
    51→  local auth_dir="$1"
    52→  mkdir -p "$auth_dir"
    53→  cliproxy_s3_sync "$(cliproxy_auth_s3_uri)" "$auth_dir/"
    54→}
    55→
    56→cliproxy_sync_auth_to_s3() {
    57→  local auth_dir="$1"
    58→  cliproxy_s3_sync "$auth_dir/" "$(cliproxy_auth_s3_uri)"
    59→}
    60→

content.text: Fix is to add a ShellCheck directive to suppress SC1090:

content.content: The file /Users/shunkakinoki/dotfiles/home-manager/services/cliproxyapi/scripts/common.sh has been updated successfully.

content.text: This adds `# shellcheck source=/dev/null` before the dynamic source, which tells ShellCheck to ignore SC1090 for that line.
